name: cloud-guard
description: PreToolUse(Bash) hard block for raw rented-GPU pod CLI usage, implemented in hexa-lang (`_cloud_guard.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). Denies `runpodctl exec` / `runpodctl ssh` / `runpodctl send-file` / `runpodctl send-file-to-pod` / `vastai exec` / `vastai ssh` / `vast exec` / `vast ssh` with a redirecting message pointing to `hexa cloud {run|nohup|poll|copy-to|copy-from|copy-dir-*|preflight}` (commons @D g8). Pod-lifecycle subcommands (`runpodctl create / ps / list` · `vastai create / show / search`) pass through — only raw remote exec / transfer is refused. NO opt-out by design (commons @D g30).
